case_title: KESHA CROMARTIE VS. NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CROMARTIE, KESHA AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KESHA CROMARTIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KEVIN BARR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROMARTIE, KESHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES
